title: Youtube Poop: Khaos Kontrol Freacs
description: Around the time Deepercutt "quit", one of the Poopers at YouChew told me I was going to be his "successor", and that I should "make a 'Sonic X' Poop every week to please my fanbase".  He was joking, of course, but I thought about the idea of making a Sonic X Poop, and decided to give it a shot.  Enjoy! :)
